title: Firework Duration Indicator
description: Shows the remaining duration of your firework on use.
body:
Shows the remaining duration of your firework on use.

![Showcases how the mod looks in-game with a firework rocket that is half gray (aka halfway through its duration) above the crosshair.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/7MZMolAT/images/b1549dbb59e879480c259e0c58a8619e30c5c4fa_350.webp)
